title: Monday App review

posts.author: reeshav (RK)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I am starting this thread to learn more about the review process of monday marketplace.

I followed the review checklist but it was told that my app doesn’t have one or more features to be included in the monday marketplace.

However, the app has item view as one of the feature , it’s a simple frontend app which uses monday react core and we don’t need monday sdk would that be a reason for concern.

Cheers.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @reeshav and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

If your app has an item view, then you need to inform that to the review team and ask them why that item view would not count as a feature

Let me know if you can not contact them for some reason!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: reeshav (RK)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks @Matias.Monday for the welcome.

So, for all the fellow makers I want to clarify, my initial intro video didn’t show item view hence it was not picked up immediately, so please make sure have the view in your intro video.

Cheers.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: I am glad you could sort that out with the review team @reeshav !!
